chunks.title: KiTS23 — Kidney & Tumor Segmentation
chunks.text: Deep learning comparison on KiTS23 dataset. Architectures: AlexNet, RNN, ResNet, InceptionV3, GoogleNet. InceptionV3 reached 92% accuracy (best). Training on 2D CT slices, Adam, CrossEntropyLoss, Google Colab T4 GPU.

chunks.title: SEMA — AI Document Search & Summarization
chunks.text: Full-stack app: semantic search, grounded Q&A, PDF/TXT summarization. React, Vite, Express, Firebase, Google Gemini API. BİL440 final project. Repository: github.com/Androidmedaa/sema-ai-summarizer

chunks.title: Flower Classification — Deep Learning
chunks.text: Five-class flower classification on Flowers-5. VGG16, ResNet101, AlexNet compared. ResNet101 test accuracy 92%. Transfer learning, TensorFlow/PyTorch. Flowers prediction website prototype.

chunks.title: GPT from Scratch — Nutuk
chunks.text: Character-level Transformer trained on Nutuk text with PyTorch. 6-layer GPT, causal self-attention, training notebook and script. github.com/Androidmedaa/Developing-GPT-from-Scratch

chunks.title: RotaAI — AI Travel Route Planner
chunks.text: React + TypeScript + .NET 9 API + Google Places. AI day-trip itineraries. github.com/Androidmedaa/RotaAI

chunks.title: Core technical skills (summary)
chunks.text: Python, PyTorch, Transformers, Whisper, RAG, FastAPI, React, Next.js, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, web scraping, time-series forecasting, OCR, vector retrieval, prompt engineering, fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA), local MCP workflows.
